intended_use: It is used by radiation oncology department to register multi-modality images and segment (non-contrast) CT images, to generate needed information for treatment planning, treatment evaluation and trea
intended_use_full: It is used by radiation oncology department to register multi-modality images and segment (non-contrast) CT images, to generate needed information for treatment planning, treatment evaluation and treatment adaptation.
target_condition: Cancer requiring radiation therapy treatment planning and evaluation
ground_truth: Comparison against reference device (K182624) using Normalized Mutual Information metric
other_metrics: Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) values compared between proposed device and reference device (K182624); proposed device NMI was non-inferior to reference device
